scope: CUDA tensor-core execution qualification for the frozen H1a coordinate trainer; model, objective, probability path, data order, batch size, seed, exposure, and checkpoint tensors remain unchanged

optimization.single_candidate: high float32 matmul precision (TF32 tensor cores) plus fused AdamW and deferred scalar logging

decision_boundary: Enable the tensor-core production path only if every equivalence check passes and the median synchronized throughput improves by at least 10% without more than 5% peak-memory growth. Failure keeps the original execution path. This protocol does not authorize additional training, a changed scientific checkpoint, tensor conditioning, H1b-H6, oracle work, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT.
